channel.title: Academic on Lucaji’s Pages
channel.description: Recent content in Academic on Lucaji’s Pages

item.title: Comunicazione Visiva
item.description: I was enrolled at Istituto Tecnico Industriale Statale “Luigi di Savoia” in Chieti, Italy. That was one of the best technical high schools at the time where I was lucky enough to have some of the best teachers around. Probably I was not the best pupil, but I would love to thank Prof. Giacomo Pisani (physics), Prof. Lucio Di Gregorio (human science) and Prof. Francesco Casale (human science). The following text (still in Italian language) has been recovered with a OCR software and adapted to Markdown.
